message:
test(node): update fleet CLI e2e test for nonexistent incident error handling

Renames fleet_release_executes_and_reports_operation to
fleet_release_nonexistent_incident_reports_error, updating the
test to verify that releasing a nonexistent incident correctly
returns an error rather than silently succeeding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
